title: Multi-Omics Analysis of the Dual Role of PIP5K1B in Gastric Adenocarcinoma: Regulation of Myofibroblasts, Remodeling of the Immune Microenvironment, and Novel Strategies for Precision Treatment.
snippet: Phosphatidylinositol-4-phosphate 5-kinase type 1 beta (PIP5K1B), an enzyme linked to actin cytoskeleton dynamics, has a paradoxical role in cancer. While pan-cancer analyses show its dual nature, its impact on overall survival (OS) in stomach adenocarcinoma (STAD) is unclear. We combined bulk RNA sequencing data (TCGA/GTEx, 33 cancers) and single- cell tran...
